message:
chore: add .vercelignore to exclude large diagnostic files

Add .vercelignore to prevent deployment of large ephemeral files
that were causing the Vercel function size limit (300MB) to be exceeded.

Excluded directories:
- screenshots_for_diagnostics/ - diagnostic screenshots
- screenshots/ - development screenshots
- playwright-report/ - test reports
- test-results/ - test artifacts
- docs/lighthouse-*.json - performance reports
- .plan.md - planning files
- tsconfig.tsbuildinfo - TypeScript build info

This fixes the "The Vercel Function exceeds the maximum size limit"
error that was blocking production deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+# Ephemeral/diagnostic files
+screenshots_for_diagnostics/
+screenshots/
+.plan.md
+
+# Development artifacts
+playwright-report/
+test-results/
+docs/lighthouse-*.json
+
+# Large build artifacts
+tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
